name: wuci-ji-site
description: Static Wuci-Ji / Wuci-OS website deployment package.

scripts.cloudflare:login: WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler/config npx wrangler login
scripts.cloudflare:whoami: WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler/config npx wrangler whoami
scripts.deploy:pages: WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler/config npx wrangler pages deploy site --project-name wuci-ji --branch main --commit-dirty true
